mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, supplier_code, supplier_name, contact_name, contact_phone, status, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM mdm_supplier WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, tenant_id, supplier_code, supplier_name, contact_name, contact_phone, status, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM mdm_supplier WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, supplier_code, supplier_name, contact_name, contact_phone, status, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM mdm_supplier WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND supplier_code = #{supplierCode} AND deleted = 0
